top_signals.title: Blume — fast, AI-ready, markdown-first docs
top_signals.summary: Latest update, v1.0.3World-class docs foreverything you ship.Fast, AI-ready, and zero-config. Drop Markdown into a folder and ship a production-grade docs site, no app boilerplate to write or maintain. Free and open source, forever.

next_read_order: briefings/latest.json only if deeper inspection is needed
